name: AGIBOT World Challenge 2026
description: World Model, VLM+VLA, and Whole-Body Control tracks for embodied AI reasoning. $530K total prize at ICRA 2026.

name: ARC Prize 2026 (ARC-AGI-2)
description: Build AI that can solve novel reasoning tasks. $425K grand prize for achieving 85%+ on ARC-AGI-2 benchmark. Open-source solutions required.

name: RoboCup 2026
description: World's largest robot AI competition. Soccer, @Home, Rescue, Industrial leagues. First time in Korea — Incheon Songdo Convensia.

name: AI for Industry Challenge
description: Cable assembly and wiring manipulation challenge. Top 30 → 10 teams compete with real robots. $180K total prize.

name: Indy Autonomous Challenge
description: Full-scale autonomous racecar competition on real tracks. Multi-university teams compete head-to-head at 180+ mph.

name: XPRIZE Autonomous Range Vehicle
description: Autonomous range vehicle competition with $5M prize pool.

name: XPRIZE Robotics Mapping
description: Robotics mapping competition with $5M prize pool.

name: OpenAI Open Model Hackathon
description: 6-week online hackathon using gpt-oss open-weight models. 'Best In Robotics' category — apply gpt-oss to real robots. $30K+ prizes.
prizeDescription: $30,000+ across categories incl. Best In Robotics

name: RoboRacer Grand Prix @ IFAC 2026
description: 1:10 scale autonomous racing at IFAC World Congress Busan. Collision avoidance, lap time minimization, overtaking. Registration deadline June 30.

name: A1 자율주행 챌린지 2026
description: National autonomous driving challenge organized by the Ministry of Science and ICT. Simulation-based autonomous driving competition for university students.

name: 현대자동차그룹 자율주행 챌린지
description: Hyundai Motor Group autonomous driving challenge. One of the most prestigious AD competitions in Korea.

name: ICRA 2026 Robot Grasping & Manipulation (RGMC)
description: Robot grasping and manipulation competition at ICRA 2026 in Vienna.

name: MIT SOLVE 10th Anniversary Global Challenge
description: MIT Solve's 10th Anniversary Global Challenge. $100K+ prize for innovative solutions to global problems.

name: FIRST Global Challenge 2026
description: International robotics olympiad with 200+ countries. Held in Incheon, Korea. Note: primarily for youth ages 14-18.

name: RoboCup ARM Challenge 2026
description: Autonomous Robot Manipulation challenge at RoboCup 2026 in Incheon, Korea.

name: 올해의 K-스타트업 2026 (도전! K-스타트업)
description: Korea's largest multi-ministry startup competition. 12+ tracks (혁신창업, 학생, 국방, 여성, AI, 연구자, 콘텐츠, 스포츠 등). Preliminary leagues Apr-Aug, finals Dec. Grand prize up to 500M KRW.
prizeDescription: 최대 5억원 (왕중왕전 우승팀). 부처별 예선 + 통합본선 → 12월 왕중왕전 20팀.

name: 정주영 창업경진대회
description: Asan Foundation startup competition. Total prize pool of 400M KRW. Next round expected 2027.

name: RoboRacer Grand Prix @ ICRA 2026
description: 1:10 scale autonomous racing. MAD-GAMES: Multi-Agent Dynamic Games theme.

name: CVPR WAD Argoverse Challenge 2026
description: Scenario Mining + LiDAR Scene Flow challenges for autonomous driving perception.

name: CVPR Embodied AI Workshop Challenges 2026
description: 3 challenges: ARNOLD (language-based manipulation), ManiSkill-ViTac (vision-tactile), ManipArena (desktop/mobile manipulation).

name: USAII Global AI Hackathon 2026
description: Online AI hackathon for students. Best Design, Technical, and Pitch awards. $15K+ prizes.

name: LeRobot Global Hackathon (LA)
description: LeRobot framework hackathon. Imitation learning, data augmentation, sim-to-real. Win a Robotis robot arm.

name: DriveX 2026: V2X Cooperative AD Challenge
description: Foundation model + V2X cooperative autonomous driving. Perception, prediction, planning, and decision-making tracks.

name: LeHome Challenge @ ICRA 2026
description: Deformable object (clothing) manipulation benchmark. Simulation phase → top 8 teams compete in-person at ICRA Vienna.

name: BARN Challenge @ ICRA 2026
description: Autonomous navigation in complex environments. Simulation + real-world benchmark at ICRA Vienna.

name: MathWorks Minidrone Competition @ IFAC 2026
description: Autonomous line-following drone algorithm design using Simulink. Simulation round → live deployment at IFAC Busan. Teams of 2-4.

name: IFAC Wearable Robot Challenge 2026
description: 48-hour hackathon for real-time wearable robotics algorithms with public performance. Innovation Award and Busan Experience Award. Teams of 3-5.

name: KSAE 대학생 자작자동차대회 자율주행 포뮬러
description: KSAE university student autonomous formula car competition. Build and race autonomous vehicles.

name: 한국지능로봇경진대회 (KIRO)
description: Korean intelligent robot competition. Multiple tracks including autonomous navigation, manipulation, and AI integration. Typically held in September.

name: 극한로봇 경진대회 2026
description: Extreme environment robot competition at Seoul AI Robot Show. 4 sections: rough terrain, obstacle climbing (stairs), fire suppression, disaster rescue. Teams of 1-10 including corporate teams. Free entry.

name: 2026 AI Co-Scientist Challenge Korea (AI 연구동료 경진대회)
description: Two tracks: Track 1 (AI-assisted research report in natural science/engineering) and Track 2 (Scientific AI Agent development, up to 2.5B KRW commercialization support for grand prize). Open to all including international participants. Free entry.
prizeDescription: Track 1: 2,300만원 상금. Track 2: 대상 최대 25억원 사업화 지원.

name: ACC Self-Driving Car Student Competition 2026
description: Student autonomous driving competition at American Control Conference. Quanser QCar platform.

name: Ignite64 Global AI Hackathon
description: Online AI hackathon spanning 18+ countries. 4 tracks. $2,200 prize pool.

name: TRON Programming Contest 2026
description: RTOS application development on µT-Kernel 3.0 with STM32N6570-DK board. Student and General divisions. Annual since 2004.

name: K-Robotics Startup Cup 2026
description: Korean robotics startup business plan competition. Prototype + pitch presentation.

name: DevNetwork AI+ML Hackathon 2026
description: AI agent building hackathon. Reasoning, tool use, real-world problem solving.

name: ICML 2026 Competition Track
description: ML competitions at ICML 2026 in Seoul. RL, optimization, robotics tracks expected. Competition track TBA.

name: DACON AI Competition 2026 Spring
description: Korean AI competition platform. Various ML/DL challenges with datasets.

name: ARC Prize 2026 (ARC-AGI-3)
description: Agentic intelligence benchmark. Milestone prizes at June 30 and Sep 30 deadlines. Part of ARC Prize 2026's $2M total pool.

name: AI Mathematical Olympiad - Progress Prize 3
description: Create open-source AI to solve IMO-level math. 110 original problems (algebra, combinatorics, geometry, number theory). Up to 128 H100 GPUs provided. Winners present at 2026 IMO Shanghai.

name: Amazon Nova AI Challenge: Trusted Software Agents
description: Global university competition for responsible GenAI/LLM coding security. Red team + developer team tracks for agentic full-stack web dev systems.
prizeDescription: 1st place $250K each role (x2), 2nd place $100K each role (x2)

name: Hull Tactical Market Prediction
description: Predict excess S&P 500 returns while managing volatility. Modified Sharpe ratio scoring. Access to proprietary financial signals dataset.

name: PhysioNet - Digitization of ECG Images
description: Build models that convert ECG paper printout images into digital time-series data. Medical AI challenge advancing healthcare digitization.

name: NVIDIA & LangChain Generative AI Agents Developer Contest
description: Build practical, efficient text and multimodal AI agents. Open to US, UK, Japan, Germany and more.

name: IEEE IES Generative AI Challenge 2026
description: Multi-stage AI hackathon for industrial GenAI applications. 2.5-month research sprint (Feb-Apr) leading to peer-reviewed paper at IRAI 2026 or IECON 2026.

name: IEEE Low-Power Computer Vision Challenge 2026
description: 3 tracks: Image-to-Text Retrieval, Action Recognition in Video, AI Generated Images Detection. Focus on efficient, low-power CV models.

name: 2026 전국민 AI 경진대회
description: National AI competition with 30 billion KRW prize pool. 4 tracks: general public, future talent (K-12), professional (university/researcher), daily innovation (vulnerable groups). Goal: 2M+ participants.

name: 국방 AI 경진대회 (MAICON) 2026
description: Defense AI competition. MUM-T (Manned-Unmanned Teaming) based military mission AI. Coding preliminary + final real-world mission. Prize pool ~59M KRW. Ages 19-34 + military personnel.

name: VDI Autonomous Driving Challenge 2026
description: 1:8 scale model car autonomous driving. Race track with pit stops, parking, highway exits. German engineering competition open internationally.

name: GigaBrain Challenge 2026 @ CVPR 2026
description: Large-scale brain-inspired AI challenge at CVPR 2026. Submission deadline May 15, 2026.

name: Computer Vision in the Wild Challenge @ CVPR 2026
description: 5th Workshop on CV in the Wild. Focus on multimodal AI agents and vision-language-action systems. Two challenges evaluating large vision models.

name: Maritime Computer Vision (MaCVi) Challenge @ CVPR 2026
description: 6 benchmark challenges: Vision-Chart Data Association, Thermal Obstacle Detection, LaRS Panoptic Segmentation, Multimodal Segmentation, Embedded Semantic Segmentation, Generalist Meta Challenge.

name: OpenDriveLab Challenge 2026 @ CVPR 2026
description: Towards Generalizable Embodied Systems. World models, end-to-end 2.0 paradigm for robotics and autonomous driving.

name: DataCV Challenge 2026 @ CVPR 2026
description: 5th DataCV Workshop and Challenge. Data-centric challenges in computer vision.

name: Adversarial ML in Computer Vision @ CVPR 2026
description: 6th Workshop on Adversarial Machine Learning in Computer Vision. Robust and trustworthy vision-language agents.

name: Beyond Visible Spectrum: AI for Agriculture @ ICPR 2026
description: CV techniques for agricultural crop disease monitoring. 1000+ participants from 10+ countries in previous editions.

name: NeurIPS 2025 Competition Track (18 competitions)
description: 18 accepted competitions including Mouse vs AI, PokéAgent Challenge, Weather4cast 2025, EEG Foundation Challenge, AIMO, and more. Competitions launched May, completed by Oct 2025.

name: NeurIPS 2026 Competition Track
description: NeurIPS 2026 in Sydney, Australia (Dec 6-12, 2026). Competition track proposals expected. Post-competition analyses publishable in Datasets & Benchmarks Track.

name: 제8회 교육 공공데이터 AI활용대회
description: Education public data AI utilization competition. AI access application Mar 16 - Apr 15, submission May 1-31.

name: 2026 AI·SW중심대학 디지털 경진대회
description: SW and AI track competition for university students. Jul 1 - Aug 11, 2026.

name: 2026 서울시 빅데이터 활용 경진대회
description: Seoul Metropolitan Government big data utilization competition. Requires BigData Campus visit (Mar 16 - May 13).

name: XPRIZE Quantum Applications
description: $5M, 3-year competition for quantum algorithms solving real-world problems. 20 semifinalists from 133 submissions across 31 countries.

name: REAL-I: 1st Real-world Embodied AI Learning Challenge @ ICRA 2026
description: First real-world embodied AI learning challenge at ICRA 2026. Bridging simulation and real-world robot deployment.

name: Legged Robot Challenges @ ICRA 2026
description: Legged robot locomotion and control challenges at ICRA 2026 Vienna.

name: AI for Robotic Surgery @ ICRA 2026
description: AI-powered robotic surgery challenge at ICRA 2026 Vienna.

name: Whole-Body Control Challenge (WBCD) @ ICRA 2026
description: Whole-body control for manipulation: puppeteering, VR, exoskeleton, gloves, or algorithmic approaches for data collection and challenging tasks.

name: World Robot Olympiad 2026
description: Theme: 'Robots Meet Culture'. Teams explore how robots can shape, protect, and grow art and culture. Korea qualifiers available via WRO Korea.

name: Apart Research Technical AI Governance Challenge
description: In-person hackathon on AI alignment, governance, and safety. Diverse perspectives tackling crucial challenges.

name: 제14회 AI·데이터 경진대회 (빅콘테스트)
description: Korea's premier big data analytics competition. Multiple tracks: Champion League, Data Analysis, Innovation sector. Expected to open mid-2026.

name: Self Driving Challenge 2026 (Netherlands)
description: 13 teams in open and closed categories compete for autonomous driving cup. International teams welcome.

name: Image Matching: Local Features & Beyond @ CVPR 2026
description: 8th Workshop on Image Matching with open challenge on Kaggle. Jun 3-4, 2026.

name: Robotics for Good Youth Challenge 2026
description: UN-based global educational robotics competition. Teams from 50+ countries. Grand Finale at AI for Good Global Summit 2026.

name: HackSecureX International Hackathon 2026
description: The AI Cyber Law Challenge. AI + cybersecurity + law intersection hackathon.

name: 2026 로봇창업 경진대회 (K-Robotics Startup Cup)
description: Physical AI-based robotics startup competition. 10 teams selected. Priority for Physical AI robot tech teams. Organized by KAIST Holdings.

name: DARPA Triage Challenge
description: Multi-year challenge for robotic triage systems in disaster response. Drones and ground robots locate casualties and assess injuries. $7M total prize. Final event November 2026.

name: Humanoid Robotics World Championship 2026
organizer: HRWC / ETH Zurich / University of Zurich
description: First global competition for humanoid and legged robots in real-world scenarios. Five verticals: healthcare, retail, logistics, disaster response, education. Co-organized with ETH Zurich and ZHAW.

name: VEX Robotics World Championship 2026
description: World's largest robotics competition. VEX IQ, VEX V5, and VEX U divisions. Thousands of teams from 60+ countries.

name: FIRST Robotics Competition 2026 (REBUILT)
description: REBUILT presented by Haas. 600+ teams from around the globe build and compete with full-size robots. Championship in Houston.

name: International Robot Olympiad 2026-2027
description: AI & STEM focused robotics olympiad. Regional competitions lead to international finals.

name: NASA Lunabotics Challenge 2026
description: Design, build, and operate a prototype lunar robot to build berms from lunar regolith. Qualifying at UCF May 12-17, Top 10 Finals at Kennedy Space Center May 19-21. US institutions only.
location: Orlando & Kennedy Space Center, Florida, USA

name: SUAS Competition 2026
description: Storm Response mission: design UAS for disaster relief. Autonomous flight, navigation, and remote sensing. 70+ teams. 250 registration fee.

name: RECF Aerial Drone Competition 2026: Time Warp
description: Mission 2026: Time Warp. Precision piloting, teamwork, and autonomous flight strategy. First Signature Event in Terre Haute, Indiana.

name: International Aerial Robotics Competition 2026
description: Longest running collegiate aerial robotics challenge in the world. Pushes state-of-the-art in aerial robotics.

name: IMechE UAS Challenge 2026
description: Design and build a UAS (max 10kg MTOM) for autonomous waypoint navigation and humanitarian aid package delivery. Fly-off at BMFA Buckminster June 29 - July 2.

name: MathWorks Global Drone Virtual Competition 2026
description: Virtual drone competition using MATLAB and Simulink. Design line follower algorithm in photorealistic Unreal Engine 3D environment. Teams of 1-4.

name: MATE ROV Competition World Championship 2026
description: Underwater ROV competition. SCOUT, NAVIGATOR, RANGER, PIONEER, and EXPLORER classes. 2026 heads to Newfoundland and Labrador, Canada.

name: Singapore AUV Challenge (SAUVC) 2026
description: Largest underwater student robotics competition in Asia. Design and build autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs).

name: RoboSub 2026
description: International AUV competition. Oceanographic exploration, mapping, object detection/manipulation, and pipeline tracking.

name: RoboBoat 2026
description: International autonomous surface vehicle (ASV) competition. 37 teams from 10 countries. 1st: $5,000, 2nd: $2,500, 3rd: $1,750.

name: Field Robot Event 2026 (FRE)
description: International student competition for autonomous agricultural robots. Row navigation, object detection, precision field work. Held as part of DLG Feldtage.

name: Farm Robotics Challenge 2026
description: Collegiate agricultural robotics competition. $50,000 Grand Prize with on-farm incubation and venture support. Submissions due May 3.

name: ASABE Robotics Student Design Competition 2026
organizer: American Society of Agricultural and Biological Engineers
description: Fully autonomous robot for simulated agricultural operations. Held at ASABE Annual Meeting.

name: Eurobot 2026: Winter is Coming
description: International autonomous robot competition. 27+ years running. Theme: 'Winter is Coming'. Robot-to-robot communication, autonomous movement, task execution.

name: ABU Robocon 2026: Kung Fu Quest
description: Two robots per team: R1 (manual/semi-auto) assembles weapons, R2 (fully autonomous) collects Kung Fu Scrolls and plays Tic-Tac-Toe to become 'Kung Fu Master'.

name: University Rover Challenge 2026
description: 38 finalists from 11 countries. Design Mars rovers for science, delivery, equipment servicing, and autonomous navigation. Record 116 teams from 18 countries registered.
location: Mars Desert Research Station (MDRS), Utah, USA

name: European Rover Challenge 2026 (ERC)
description: 12th edition. Autonomous rovers on world's largest artificial Mars Yard. Tasks: Probing, Maintenance, Navigation + Drone.

name: International Rover Challenge 2026 (IRC)
description: Top 20 + 5 wildcards compete on 20,000 sq meter Sproscape arena. Missions: autonomy, mobility, manipulation, science.

name: RoboMaster University League 2026
description: Intercollegiate robot combat by DJI. 3V3 Match, Infantry Match, Engineer Challenge. Design Infantry, Hero, and Sentry robots.

name: Surgical Robot Challenge 2026
description: Showcase surgical robot technology innovations. 2-minute video entry. Focus on frugal innovation for LMICs. Winner gets trip to Hamlyn Symposium London.

name: Wall-Climbing Robot Challenge 2026 (WCRC)
description: Wall-climbing robot design and competition. Open to students and hobbyists.

name: ESA CanSat 2025-2026
description: Build a can-sized satellite. 25+ countries host national competitions. National winners invited to ESA ESTEC in Netherlands for Space Engineer for a Day event. Ages 14-19.

name: Shell Eco-marathon 2026
description: Global student competition to design the most energy-efficient car. Qatar event Jan 21-25 at Lusail Circuit. Prototype and UrbanConcept classes with battery-electric, hydrogen fuel cell, and ICE categories.

name: REVEL & NVIDIA Physical AI Hackathon
description: World's largest Physical AI Hackathon. $100K+ prize pool incl. humanoid robot grand prize. Manipulation, perception, agentic control challenges with LEGO Group tasks.

name: TechnoXian World Cup 10.0
description: World's biggest robotics championship. 15+ categories: Sumo Bots, Line Follower, Maze Solver, Combat Robots, Drone Racing, Micromouse, and more.

name: Robotex International 2026
description: World's biggest robotics festival, relocating from Estonia to South Korea for 2026. LEGO, sumo, line-following, maze, autonomous drones. 3000+ competitors.

name: NHRL Robot Fighting World Championships 2026
description: Professional robot combat league. 9 Open Qualifiers, 3 Pro Tour events, December World Championships. Free YouTube streams.

name: BattleBots Pro League 2026
description: 250lb heavyweight robot combat. BattleBots Pro League powered by Bright Data. Live tapings in Las Vegas, fights on YouTube.

name: IROS 2026 Competitions
description: Robot competitions at IROS 2026 in Pittsburgh ('Roboburgh'). SLAM competition by Hilti confirmed. Perception, learning, control tracks.

name: 국제로봇콘테스트 @ 로보월드 2026
description: International Robot Contest at RobotWorld 2026 (KINTEX). Multiple tracks: Robot Manufacturing, ZEUS Robot Mission, AI Autonomous Driving, and more.

name: 지능로봇대회 2026
description: Korean national intelligent robot competition. Categories: Robocon, AI autonomous driving, air sports, humanoid robot missions. Typically October-November.

name: 부산 로봇경진대회 2026
description: Busan regional robot competition. Robot Escape Room, Marine Robot Challenge, and other tracks.

name: Neurobots Championship 2026
description: India's premier championship in Robotics, Drone Technology, and Agentic AI. 5000+ participants. Prizes: INR 10L+.

name: 2026 엔지니어링산업 경진대회
description: Design ideas and BIM competition for sustainable engineering solutions using digital technology. Topics include smart city, carbon neutrality, and extreme environment engineering. Total prize 44.1M KRW across 24 awards including MOTIE Minister's Award.
eligibility: 고등학생, 전문대 이상 재학생(휴학생 포함). BIM 부문은 졸업생도 가능.

name: 제23회 임베디드 소프트웨어 경진대회
description: Korea's premier embedded software competition with free-topic and designated tracks (sponsored by LG, Hyundai, etc.). Grand prize 5M KRW. Open to all Korean citizens.

name: 2026 대한민국 드론 공방전
description: Korea's national drone offense-defense competition. Total prize 152M KRW. 25B KRW in R&D testing budget for qualifying teams. Winners get military procurement priority and government project advantages.
prizeDescription: 총 1억 5,200만원 (분야별 1위 3,000만원 + 국방부장관상/과기부장관상). 본선팀 총 25억원 실증시험 예산 지원.

name: 2026 경기도 대학생 자율주행 경진대회
nameEn: 2026 Gyeonggi Province Student Autonomous Driving Competition
description: Regional autonomous driving competition for university students in Gyeonggi Province. 3-month training program followed by competition at Pangyo Zero City. 10 universities, 20 teams participated in 2026.

name: 제16회 전국학생설계경진대회 (KSCDC 2026)
description: National student design competition by KSME. High school and university divisions compete with creative mechanical design solutions addressing climate change and sustainable energy. ~300 teams participate annually.
prizeDescription: 대상, 경암대상, 금상, 은상, 동상, 포스터상 등 (부문별 시상)

name: 2026 ICT 융합 프로젝트 공모전
description: Open-topic project contest covering electronics, robotics, AI, and mechanical engineering. Submit A4 10-30 page report with circuit diagrams, source code, and build process. Prizes in DeviceMart credit.
prizeDescription: 총 500만원 상당 (대상 100만원, 최우수 50만원, 우수 20만원, 장려 10만원) - 디바이스마트 예치금

name: 나노영챌린지 2026 (Nano Young Challenge 2026)
description: Annual nanotechnology ideas competition for graduate and undergraduate students. Past prizes: Grand prize 5M KRW, 2nd 3M KRW. Held alongside NanoKorea conference.

name: 제2회 글로벌 퀀텀 AI 경진대회
description: Quantum cloud-based AI competition to expand quantum computing user experience and cultivate next-gen quantum AI talent. 5x prize increase from 1st edition. Top 10 teams advance to finals.

name: 2026 한국 대학생 반도체 설계 경진대회
description: National semiconductor design competition for university students. Teams design and fabricate actual chips using public nanofab facilities. Includes 'My Chip' practical track.

name: 아모레퍼시픽 2026 AI Innovation Challenge
description: AI innovation contest by Korea's largest cosmetics company. Two tracks: AGENT (AI agent development) and CREATIVE (creative AI application). Grand prize 10M KRW.

name: 2026년 청년 AI 솔루션 챌린지
description: Youth AI challenge for ages 19-34. Teams of 3 compete in preliminary and finals rounds. Winners receive prize money and conference access.

name: 제14회 한국로보컵오픈 2026
description: National RoboCup qualifier for RoboCup 2026 Incheon. Multiple leagues including Soccer, Rescue, @Home, and Junior divisions. Top teams qualify for RoboCup 2026 international.

name: 국제로봇올림피아드 AI 자율주행 경진대회 (IROC)
nameEn: International Robot Olympiad AI Autonomous Driving Contest
description: AI autonomous driving contest as part of the International Robot Olympiad. Combines robotics education with autonomous driving technology competition.

name: AI TOP 100 (Campus) 2026
description: AI problem-solving competition for high school and university students. Collaborate with AI to solve real-world problems. Top 10 winners receive MSIT Minister's Award and prize money.

name: 딥페이크 범죄 대응 AI 탐지 모델 경진대회
nameEn: Deepfake Crime Detection AI Model Contest
description: AI model competition for deepfake crime detection. Develop AI models to identify manipulated media content. Open to all participants regardless of background.

name: KSAE 대학생 자작자동차대회 2026
description: Annual student vehicle design and build competition. Includes Baja, Formula, and E-Formula categories plus Smart e-Mobility Competition. Teams design, build, and race vehicles.

name: 나노코리아 2026 (NanoKorea Conference)
description: 24th International Nanotechnology Conference. Features academic presentations, industry exhibitions, and the Nano Young Challenge awards ceremony.

name: DSK 2026 (드론쇼코리아 2026)
description: Korea's drone industry exhibition and conference. Features drone commercialization, Industry 5.0 drone applications, and international cooperation tracks.

name: 자율주행모빌리티산업전 (AME 2026)
description: Korea's autonomous mobility industry exhibition themed 'Driving the Future'. Showcases Level 4 fully autonomous vehicles and specialized autonomous driving solutions for industry.

name: 국민대 자율주행 경진대회 2026
description: University-level autonomous driving competition hosted by Kookmin University's SW-focused college. Teams of 3-5 students build and race autonomous vehicles.

name: SEDEX 2026 (제28회 반도체대전)
description: Korea's largest semiconductor professional exhibition. Features industry showcases, academic presentations, and networking. Free with pre-registration.

name: AIAA Design/Build/Fly 2026
description: 30th anniversary DBF competition. Design, fabricate, and fly an unmanned electric RC aircraft (Banner Towing Bush Plane). $3000/$2000/$1500 prizes.

name: Airbus Fly Your Ideas 2026
description: Global student challenge to pioneer digital technologies for connected aerospace cybersecurity. Finalists get guaranteed Airbus internship, winners visit Farnborough Airshow.
prizeDescription: Guaranteed internship for finalists, VIP Farnborough visit for winners

name: International Rocket Engineering Competition (IREC) 2026
description: World's largest intercollegiate rocket competition. 175 teams design, build, test and launch rockets with 2kg+ payload to 10,000-100,000 ft altitude.

name: NASA Student Launch Challenge 2026
description: Artemis-inspired rocket competition. Design, build, and fly high-powered rocket with habitat payload for STEMnauts. Culminates at Bragg Farms, Alabama.

name: AAS CanSat Competition 2026
description: Design a can-sized satellite with paraglider instrument delivery mission. Teams build and launch a CanSat via rocket.

name: CANSAT India Student Competition 2026
description: Model Rocketry and CANSAT competition for Indian undergraduate engineering/science students.

name: IAF Space Universities CubeSat Challenge
description: 3rd Space Universities CubeSat Challenge. Free launch aboard Chinese launcher and deployment from Chinese Space Station.

name: Formula SAE Michigan 2026
description: Design, build, and race a formula-style internal combustion racecar. Up to 120 teams. SAE's premier engineering competition.

name: Formula SAE Electric 2026
description: Design, build, and race an electric formula-style racecar. Up to 100 teams.

name: Baja SAE Oregon 2026
description: Design and build an off-road vehicle that survives punishing terrain. Endurance, suspension, and hill climb events.

name: Baja SAE New York 2026
description: Design and build an off-road vehicle. Endurance, suspension, and hill climb events.

name: Baja SAE Ohio 2026
description: Design and build an off-road vehicle. Endurance, suspension, and hill climb events.

name: Formula Hybrid + Electric 2026
description: Most complex SAE Collegiate Design Series event. Design and build a hybrid or electric-only formula racecar.

name: SAE Aero Design East 2026
description: Design and prototype RC/autonomous aircraft. Regular, Micro, and Advanced classes. Sponsored by MathWorks.

name: SAE Aero Design West 2026
description: Design and prototype RC/autonomous aircraft. Regular, Micro, and Advanced classes. Sponsored by MathWorks.

name: ASME/SME Student Manufacturing Design Competition 2026
description: Foster interest in manufacturing through innovative design. 8 finalist teams present at MSEC/NAMRC 54. $1000/$750/$500 prizes.

name: ASME e-Human Powered Vehicle Challenge 2026
description: Design, fabricate, and race a human powered recumbent tricycle. Now includes pedal-assist motor option. Part of ASME E-Fest.

name: IMechE Design Challenge 2026
description: Teams of 3-6 build a wire rope climbing robot for non-destructive testing or fibre optic cable deployment.

name: Formula Student UK 2026
description: Europe's most established educational motorsport competition. FS, FS-AI (autonomous), and Concept classes. 100+ teams at Silverstone.

name: IEEE CASS Student Design Competition 2026
description: 10th CASS SDC. Worldwide competition for circuits/systems solutions to real-life problems. Finals at ISCAS 2026 Shanghai. $3000 winning team.
prizeDescription: $3000 winning team + travel reimbursement for 4 regional finalists

name: IEEE PELS Aerospace Power Electronics Design Challenge 2026
description: Design a power electronic converter for aerospace environments. Simulation-only (no hardware required). Teams up to 3 members.

name: APEC 2026 Student Demonstration Competition
description: Inaugural student demo competition at APEC. Showcase innovative power electronics research. $500 travel grant per selected team.

name: International Future Energy Challenge (IFEC)
description: International student competition for innovation, conservation, and effective use of electrical energy. Hardware demonstration required.

name: MITRE eCTF (Embedded Capture the Flag) 2026
description: Design a secure storage solution for a chip foundry. Free participation with provided dev boards. Cybersecurity + embedded systems focus.

name: Not-a-Boring Competition 2026
description: Design and build a tunnel boring machine to beat the snail. 8-day on-site competition. Mini-competition for first-year teams.

name: Maritime RobotX Challenge 2026
description: International maritime autonomous robotics competition. Multi-vehicle autonomy with cross-domain coordination. Open to HS and university teams.

name: XPRIZE Wildfire
description: 4-year, $11M competition for firefighting tech innovation. Grand Prize awarded in 2026.

name: XPRIZE Water Scarcity
description: $119M, 5-year competition for affordable seawater desalination systems. Track B testing deadline March 2026.

name: XPRIZE Healthspan
description: 7-year, $101M competition to extend healthy lifespans by 10-20 years.

name: SEDS Space Development for Earth Challenge 2026
description: Research and propose a megaproject in space (solar power satellites, planetary sunshades, in-space manufacturing). Cash prize + SpaceVision gala tickets.

name: 2026 대한민국 드론공방전
description: Attack drone vs anti-drone tactical competition. Total prize 152M KRW (~$110K USD). Real combat-style drone warfare.

name: 제26회 한국지능로봇경진대회
description: Korea's longest-running robot festival. 26th edition. ~30M KRW in prizes (governor/mayor/director awards).

name: VisualSim Electronics Hackathon 2026
description: Semiconductor system modeling competition. $1000 prizes + job interview opportunities. ~5 hours online.

name: IEEE SoutheastCon 2026 Student Competitions
description: Hardware (autonomous robot + micro UAV), Software, Circuit Design, Ethics, and Outreach competitions at IEEE Region 3 conference.

name: AEAC National Student UAS Competition 2026
description: Urban firefighting UAS challenge. Flying phase May 22-24 at Area X.O in Ottawa.

name: DVCon India Global Design Contest 2026
description: Multi-stage FPGA design contest: idea submission, simulation, hardware implementation. Feb-Sep 2026.

name: Agentic FPGA Backend Optimization Competition @ FPL 2026
description: Leverage Agentic AI + open-source CAD (RapidWright) + AMD Vivado to optimize FPGA designs for maximum clock frequency.

name: Collegiate Rocket Launch Competition 2026
description: Design, build, and launch a high-power rocket. Collegiate teams compete on altitude accuracy and payload.

name: Midwest High-Power Rocketry Competition 2026
description: Secret Message Challenge. High-power rocketry competition for university teams.

name: AIAA Design Competitions 2026
description: Multiple design categories: aircraft, space systems, propulsion. Proposals due May 15, 2026. Team roster by Feb 6.

name: 2026 SAME Undergraduate Innovation Design Challenge
description: Undergraduate engineering innovation design challenge focused on military/infrastructure applications.

name: XPRIZE Future Vision (Sci-Fi Film)
description: Global sci-fi film competition. 3-minute optimistic tech-future trailers/shorts. $2.5M production + $100K cash grand prize.
prizeDescription: $2.5M production funding + $100K cash (grand), $100K each for 4 finalists

name: IOT Data Hackathon 2026 (Hong Kong)
description: IoT + open data + AI hackathon. Student and Professional streams. Low-altitude economy, AI marketing, supply chain.

name: 2026 전국민 AI 경진대회
description: National AI competition with 3B KRW (~$2.2M USD) total prize. Multiple tracks launching from April 2026.
